title: Duomo Firenze Cripta e Resti dell'Antica Cattedrale: Guida e Orari
highlights: Santa Reparata è la radice che tiene in piedi il gigante del Duomo. Spesso dimenticata dai flussi turistici più frettolosi, la cripta della Cattedrale nasconde i resti dell’antica basilica paleocristiana. title: Santa Reparata | Opera Duomo, Florence
highlights:
Duomo, Florence
Santa Reparata
# Ancient basilica of Santa Reparata  ...    Inside the cathedral, between the first and second pillars on the right of the central nave, a stairway**descends to the site of the ancient basilica of Santa Reparata, brought to light during an archaeological campaign lasting from 1965 to 1973**. Here, the visitor experiences a journey back in time, through the construction phases of one of the first Christian temples in the history of Florence. The ancient basilica remained standing and was officiated for more than eight  ...    body of the new cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore. The new church was in fact much larger, and until demolition had  ...    early-medieval churches of the Tuscia region: 50 metres (164 feet) in length and 25 metres (82 feet) wide, in triple-nave basilica plan, adorned with an extraordinary mosaic floor in geometric motifs, with Solomonic knots, vases  ...
